creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
Hi,

I can't compile sysutils/lsof too, but I meet another error
(/usr/src/sys/sys/user.h:92:2: error: #error "Unknown architecture").
More informations at the end.

Regards.

Olivier



uname -a

23:31:01 CEST 2010
